feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Sap Public Cloud - auto population of the account assignment category(AAC) in Purchase Order
entry.content:
On SAP Public cloud, at purchase order creation, is it possible to implement an auto population of the account assignment category(AAC) based on PO type.

The BADI MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_ITEM does not allow modification of the field account assignment category. Any advice if it is possible to modify the AAC ? Else please let us know if we should've used another badi ?  Thanks

entry.title: Inspection lot not getting generated for customer stock using QA07
entry.content:
Users are not able to create inspection lot for reoccurring inspection type 09 using  QA07.

Material: 91000000

Batch: 10020108

entry.title: Country version Spain SEPA file
entry.content:
Hello,

 

We have extracted a SEPA file from the Starter system and we are getting a format error when uploading it into the bank. The file should be version pain.001.001.03 and the system generates a version pain.001.001.09 file.
Reviewing the SAP documentation for SPAIN we see that the CGI format we are using should output pain.001.001.03:

 

Asignación de formato de pago específico de país o región | SAP Help Portal

Asignación de formato de pago específico de país o región | SAP Help Portal


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Fixed Assets Migration - Asset Value Date and Depreciation calculation Issue
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

As part of our fixed assets migration, we are experiencing an issue with the depreciation calculation.

The assets in question are being migrated during the fiscal year, and the Legacy Data Transfer Settings have been configured in the application “Make Company Code Settings – Asset Accounting Specific”, with a Transfer Date of 30/04/2025.

However, after migrating the assets, we noticed that the depreciation calculation started from 01/01/2025 instead of from period 04/2025.

Upon reviewing the assets post-migration, we found that the Asset Value Date was set to 01/01/2025, even though we did not populate this field in the migration template. We believe that this field is the root cause of the issue.

Could you please clarify how this field is derived?

For your information, we filled in the following three tabs in the “Fixed Assets – Postings” migration object: Posting Key ; Cumulative Values ;Transaction Headers.

We also noticed that the Asset Value Date field exists in the Transaction Items tab, which we did not initially complete. We did tests by filling in this tab, but encountered errors due to the Asset Transaction Type 970 (Asset Data Transfer) we used.

Is there another asset transaction type that should be used for mid-year data migrations ? Please suggest an alternative solution if possible.

Thank you in advance for your help.

entry.title: Mass update check rule for the business partners.
entry.content:
We recently enabled credit management BP Role for 5000 customers (In Production System), in "Credit profile" check rule we kept wrongly as "01" instead of "02" and we don't have this filed to mass update.

entry.title: Multiple Billing Document Attachments in Single Email Transmission
entry.content:
Good afternoon,

Is it possible to group multiple Billing Documents (PDF Attachments) for the same customer in a single email output transmission?

entry.title: Product Allocation Not appreaing in Availability check Sales Order
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am trying to execute the product allocation in S4 HANA sales Public cloud, and I have completed all the steps 

  1. Configure Product allocation 
  2. Manage Product Allocation Sequence
  3. Product allocation planning data
  4. Assign Product to product allocation 

I have even enabled PAL in CBC. But still, during the sales Order Processing, no object appears. 

In Material Master, I have used SR as a check for availability. 

Need Help here.

entry.title: Change Number is ignored for class type 300 in S/4HANA Cloud

entry.title: It is not possible to schedule the deferred tax job automatically within the app
entry.content:
In the transfer deferred tax app we are executing the report or job for many documents.  This job has poor performance and requires manual execution there is no option for scheduling.

 

Is it possible to schedule the job automatically? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Ask about Exchange Rate Error in Manage Workforce
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Today, I attempted to import Worker and Work Agreement data using the "Manage Workforce" app. However, I encountered the following error message:

"Enter rate CZK / JPY rate type M for DD.MM.YYYY in the system settings."

I’m unsure why this exchange rate is required, as I did not enter any payment information for the worker. The payment section in the import file is blank, so I assumed there would be no dependency on exchange rate data.

Could you please clarify why this error is occurring?

 

Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards,

entry.title: Loop AT item table of custom bo
entry.content:
I want to loop the item table(Composition) of custom bo from Root(AlloyCode) Before Save logic . How can i do it? Is there any code sample?

This is my custom bo structure.

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin

entry.title: How to maintain the Packaging Material Type? What is the configuration activity to do it
entry.content:
How can we maintain a Packaging Material Type?

Is there an app or configuration activity in the system where this setting can be adjusted?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Intercompany project accruals
entry.content:
I  have an issue with project accounting and reporting from projects. The problem is related to large co-operation projects that are global in nature and use resources, expenses, and revenue intercompany e.g. project owned by Brazilian company code is contributed to by companies in US/Europe/Africa.

We are able to post time writing, travel expense costs, and services (which include markup for travel expenses) for intercompany. 
Where we have a problem is the accruals & deferrals of cost/revenue from the supplying companies. It is not supported by SAP to post accruals in the supplying companies towards an intercompany project. Revenue recognition in SAP only posts on the project in the company code which owns the project.
 
This means we are unable to post accruals or deferrals across the companies to the global projects which results to not being able to show correct numbers in reporting for contributions per company to the global projects and the total margins after eliminating internal costs with internal revenue. Any suggestions for this issue?

entry.title: Fiori Reuse Library
entry.content:
Dear Community,

We have an interesting problem.

We developed a Fiori app using Business Application Studio (BAS) and integrated the Reuse Component for Change Documents following the provided instructions (How to Use the Fiori Reuse Library | SAP Help Portal)

The app runs perfectly in BAS. However, after deployed it to the Public Cloud. The apps failed to run, showing the error:""
My source code Reuse Library: Reuse_library 
Am i missing any permissions to use Reuse Library in Customizing.

Any insights or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition  

SAPUI5  

SAP Fiori

entry.title: Sales BOM explosion with component of item category SERV
entry.content:
Dear community,

in our Public cloud system we are trying to include non-tangible subcomponent into Sales BOM (firmware product). In master data Item category group is set to SERV. Adding the product as subcomponent to main Sales BOM item works perfectly.

Problem is that this item is skipped during BOM explosion in Sales order document.

I tried to assign different Item type when setting up Sales BOM, but result is same. In blogs I read that there are limitations for CPFH scenario and DISH scenario but in our case we would like to use either ERLA or LUMF cases.

"Limitations for variant CPFH:

  • Scenarios with 3rd party items, bought in items and service materials are not supported."

    Do you have any suggestion how to resolve this issue?

    Thanks in advance.

entry.title: How to extract a list of the users of who have not created and maintained a substitute for approvals
entry.content:
Dear Sap Team, 

I am trying to extract a list of the users of who have created and maintained a substitute for approvals (planned/unplanned) in the S/4HANA Public Cloud as we have several times faced issues when user delegation in MyInbox is not maintained. How can I as Admin create such a list to contact people who did not add a substitute?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.content:
